surfaces.name: core_skill_application_summary
surfaces.primary_question: Which project-core kernel skills are actually finishing and how often, without inferring usage from general receipt volume?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate core_skill_application_receipt payloads by kernel_id and skill_name

surfaces.name: object_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How often and how broadly is each source object showing up in the current receipt feed?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group receipts by object_ref and keep counts, latest timestamps, and bounded posture flags

surfaces.name: candidate_lineage_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How far are reviewed growth-refinery candidates actually moving without turning stats into routing or proof authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed-only candidate_lineage_entries carried on harvest_packet_receipt payloads into stage, owner-target, posture, misroute, supersession, and time-to-stage summaries

surfaces.name: owner_landing_summary
surfaces.primary_question: Which reviewed candidates have landed in owner-local status surfaces and how far has that landing stabilized without turning stats into owner truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed_owner_landing_receipt payloads together with seed_owner_landing_trace_receipt payloads into owner-repo, posture, outcome, and time-to-outcome summaries

surfaces.name: supersession_drop_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What pruning, replacement, merge, and reanchor signals are explicit across reviewed growth-refinery receipts without inventing reasons or ranking authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed candidate-lineage entries, reviewed_owner_landing_receipt payloads, and seed_owner_landing_trace_receipt payloads into explicit turnover summaries

surfaces.name: repeated_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What changed across bounded date windows without turning the result into one global score?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group receipts by observed_at date and keep counts plus bounded window signals

surfaces.name: route_progression_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded multi-axis movement is visible on each named route?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate progression_delta_receipt payloads by route_ref and sum axis deltas

surfaces.name: fork_calibration_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How are route forks actually being chosen and how often do they carry realized outcome refs?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate decision_fork_receipt payloads by route_ref and chosen_branch

surfaces.name: session_growth_branch_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What reviewed next-kernel branches are being recommended after closeout without turning stats into route authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed followthrough hints carried on decision_fork_receipt payloads into next-skill, owner-target, posture, defer, and reason-code counts

surfaces.name: automation_pipeline_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How close is a named automation pipeline to seed-ready bounded use?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate automation_candidate_receipt payloads by pipeline_ref and readiness flags

surfaces.name: automation_followthrough_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How far are reviewed automation candidates moving through bounded follow-through without implying scheduler authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate automation_candidate_receipt payloads into seed-ready, defer, checkpoint, playbook-seed, real-run-review, and blocker counts

surfaces.name: codex_plane_deployment_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current derived deployment continuity posture for the shared-root Codex plane without letting stats overrule live trust evidence?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one bounded deployment summary from the 8Dionysus trust-state and rollout receipt examples plus the aoa-sdk deploy-status example

surfaces.name: codex_rollout_operations_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What checked-in trusted rollout campaign posture is currently visible for the shared-root Codex plane without turning stats into rollout authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive bounded rollout state counts and latest campaign posture from 8Dionysus checked-in generated/codex/rollout source surfaces

surfaces.name: codex_rollout_drift_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current bounded drift and rollback posture of the latest trusted Codex rollout campaign without replacing source-owned campaign history?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive the latest drift window, drift state, repair attempt posture, and rollback requirement from 8Dionysus checked-in rollout history and rollback windows

surfaces.name: rollout_campaign_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current bounded campaign cadence posture for the shared-root Codex plane without turning stats into cadence authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one current campaign-cadence summary from 8Dionysus source-owned rollout campaign, drift-review, and rollback-followthrough window examples

surfaces.name: drift_review_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What named drift signals and explicit review decisions are currently visible in the source-owned cadence windows without replacing rollout or campaign truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one bounded drift-review summary from the current 8Dionysus cadence windows and keep rollback readiness descriptive only

surfaces.name: continuity_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current bounded self-agency continuity posture without turning stats into continuity truth or self-agency proof?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one bounded continuity snapshot from the aoa-agents continuity window example, the sovereign continuity playbook, the memo-side provenance thread example, and the landed continuity eval anchors

surfaces.name: component_refresh_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current bounded component refresh posture across named owner repos without letting stats become refresh truth or maintenance authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one bounded component refresh snapshot from reviewed aoa-sdk drift hints and reviewed followthrough decisions while keeping owner validation stronger

surfaces.name: runtime_closeout_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What is the current bounded runtime closeout posture across program waves and how did reviewed handoff land?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate runtime_wave_closeout_receipt payloads by program_id and wave_id and keep the latest gate plus handoff posture

surfaces.name: stress_recovery_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What does the current repeated-window stress recovery proof family say without inventing a new canonical event kind or outranking owner evidence?
surfaces.derivation_rule: resolve aoa-stress-recovery-window eval_result_receipt report_ref paths through aoa-evals and derive one bounded summary plus suppression posture

surfaces.name: surface_detection_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What second-wave surface-detection signals are accumulating without turning stats into routing authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate advisory surface_detection_context payloads on finish-stage core_skill_application_receipt envelopes by observed date
